NAVAREA XIX 15/26
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  250630 UTC JAN 26
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-27.20N 020-09.00E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 70-40.46N 018-25.80E COSL PROSPECTOR
 65-51.70N 007-23.80E SCARABEO 8
 65-31.00N 007-12.00E TRANSOCEAN NORGE
 65-01.90N 006-52.40E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　11/26
